title: Revenue Recovery — Wave A.2: ATC Root Cause
executive_summary: The reported 0-ATC catastrophe was a false positive. Real cart events ARE being recorded — under activity_type='cart'. Roughly 10 readers across the platform query for 'add_to_cart' instead, including the Wave A funnel validator. Playwright crawl of 5 PDPs on mobile + desktop confirmed Add To Cart fires successfully end-to-end and writes to visitor_activity. After patching the validator, the funnel now reads 2 green / 3 yellow / 3 red.

findings.title: Activity-type contract drift: cart vs add_to_cart
findings.detail: src/contexts/CartContext.tsx writes activity_type='cart'. The following readers query for 'add_to_cart' and silently report 0: supabase/functions/rr-funnel-validator, supabase/functions/monitoring-conversion-tracker, supabase/functions/monitoring-landing-page-scores, supabase/functions/monitoring-ads-health-map, src/components/admin/CRODashboard.tsx, src/components/admin/GrowthAnalyticsDashboard.tsx, src/lib/ab-test-analytics.ts, src/lib/commerce-intelligence/pricing-intelligence.ts, src/lib/commerce-intelligence/demand-prediction.ts, src/pages/admin/ProfitSystemDashboard.tsx. The real wire value is 'cart' and has been for the full history window — do NOT migrate the emitter.
findings.fix: Patched rr-funnel-validator to query .in('activity_type', ['cart','add_to_cart']). The other ~10 readers will report false 0s until each is patched the same way. Recommend a follow-up sweep before activating ARO so its profit math isn't poisoned.

findings.title: PDP renders 9–13 duplicate Add to Cart buttons (mobile)
findings.detail: Per-PDP DOM contains 9–13 buttons with text matching 'Add to Cart'. All but one (the visible sticky bar button at top≈780, 185–204×56) collapse to 0×0. The visible button works on click. The duplicates are wasteful and confuse automated testing and accessibility readers.
findings.fix: Out of scope for Wave A.2 (not blocking conversion). Schedule cleanup in Wave C alongside the regression test suite.

findings.title: Two overlapping sticky bottom bars on PDP mobile
findings.detail: ProductDetail.tsx inline sticky CTA (z-50, bottom-0) and components/products/PdpStickyAtc.tsx (z-40, bottom-0) both render simultaneously on mobile PDPs. z-50 wins visually so users still see one bar, but the duplicate burns paint cycles and complicates click targeting in tests.
findings.fix: Pick one as canonical; remove the other. Out of scope for Wave A.2.

findings.title: Sitemap emits /product/ (singular) URLs
findings.detail: sitemap-products-1.xml lists URLs as https://getpawsy.pet/product/<slug> (singular). The canonical project rule is /products/ (plural). Both URLs return HTTP 200 so there is no redirect chain, but Pinterest pin destinations and GSC click attribution may fragment between the two shapes.
findings.fix: Generate the sitemap from the same slug helper used by <link rel=canonical>. Verify the renderer in scripts/sitemap-utils.mjs or scripts/validate-sitemaps.mjs.

recommended_next: Wave A.3: sweep the other ~10 readers to use the correct activity_type
Wave B: Pinterest CAPI outbox empty + 0 pins published 24h — diagnose publisher + attribution
Wave C: regression test for ATC + cleanup duplicate ATC buttons + dedupe sticky bars
Wave D: real Stripe E2E (confirm test-mode vs live-mode first)
